message:
feat(crypto,replay): expand signature blob nested-object parsing and enforce evidence event chronological ordering

decode_signature_blob (main.rs):
  Extract extract_signature_candidates_from_object helper that probes
  nested JSON objects for signature data under an extensive set of field
  names: bytes/hex/base64/b64 variants in snake_case, kebab-case, and
  camelCase. When a top-level field value is itself an object (e.g.
  {"signature": {"base64": "..."}} or {"sigB64": "..."}), the nested
  object is now recursively probed instead of being silently skipped.
  Rename parse_byte_array to parse_signature_byte_array for clarity.
  Add tests: decode_signature_blob_accepts_json_object_sig_b64 and
  decode_signature_blob_accepts_json_object_nested_base64.

validate_incident_evidence_package (replay_bundle.rs):
  Add chronological ordering enforcement: events must have non-decreasing
  timestamps (microsecond precision via normalize_timestamp). Returns a
  new EvidenceEventsUnsorted error variant with previous_index and
  next_index when an out-of-order event is detected. Add regression test
  that swaps two events and verifies the correct error is returned.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
